title: orthochilus adenoglossus
intro: Orthochilus adenoglossus, also known as the Red-stemmed Chirida or Chirida, is a species of orchid native to tropical regions in India and Southeast Asia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Orthochilus adenoglossus include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory problems such as bronchitis and asthma. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a decoction, made by boiling the roots and leaves in water, and is also used to make a tincture or a powder for consumption.
